strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure with real-world deployment (GISCollective, DLang services)
Hands-on exposure to agentic workflows via MCP code generators and AI-agent tooling at re:cinq
Strong engineering leadership demonstrated through team mentoring, CI/CD setup, and technical workshops across multiple companies
concerns: No explicit evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated environments
Lack of demonstrated experience with real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance infrastructure
Limited visibility into scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or governing hybrid external engineering models
response.justification: The candidate brings strong full-stack engineering discipline, event-driven system design, and open-source leadership, with recent exposure to agentic tooling, but lacks demonstrable experience in fintech infrastructure, regulated AI deployment, and scaling technical teams to executive levels required for this role.
